conditions.evidence_text: In LCCC experiments, the column was put in a jacket connected with a bath/circulator so that the column temperature was kept constant at 43 °C. The mobile phase was a mixture of CH2Cl2/CH3CN (57/43, v/v), and the flow rate was 0.5 mL/min.
conditions.notes: The setup was used to fractionate cyclic polystyrenes from linear precursors.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: LCCC at the critical condition of linear PS
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry and Center for Integrated Molecular Systems, Pohang University of Science and Technology, Pohang, 790-784, Korea
